title: Fresh Animations x Creepy's Hat
description: That's Creepy, but with Fresh Animations'... animations.
body:
Hey! That's Creepy... again! 

![Creepy, with cooler moves!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1643e77306e293da43858363d2030449be23aca5_0.webp)

# FEATURES
- Rename a nametag to "Creepy" then put it on a random creeper you see in the supermarket... Et poof! 
- Compatible with [BBS Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/bbs-mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/bbs-mod)'s Mob Form
- Compatible with [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

![Rename a nametag to "Creepy" with the Anvil!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c413a7b1aef1140237498425564611f043a660a.png)
